summary: SoniqueBar (Jarvis) is a macOS menu-bar voice assistant that listens for wake words, routes intents to LLM providers, and speaks responses via text-to-speech. It integrates with developer tools and services like GitHub, Docker, Slack, and Obsidian, and runs a local Kokoro TTS service for on-device speech synthesis using MLX.

nodes.title: Frontend
nodes.notes: Native macOS menu-bar app with settings UI, wake-word listening, and screen awareness

nodes.title: Backend
nodes.notes: Swift service layer (intent routing, context/memory engines, orchestration) plus a Python Kokoro FastAPI service for local TTS

nodes.title: Integrations
nodes.notes: Pluggable connectors and LLM/voice provider adapters for external tools and AI services

nodes.title: Infrastructure
nodes.notes: Build, deploy, and sidecar scripts plus Xcode project and SPM package configuration
